reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Very disappointing and unacceptable experience at Novotel Abu Dhabi Al Bustan.

During check-in, the reception team clearly agreed to extend our check-out until 2 PM. However, the next day, without any notice or communication, they suddenly deactivated our room cards, locked the parking access, and treated us in a very disrespectful and humiliating manner, as if we had done something wrong.

We were left unable to access our room or even leave the parking area properly. Instead of honoring their promise, the staff created unnecessary stress and embarrassment for us and our family.

A hotel should respect its guests and keep its commitments. Unfortunately, this experience showed poor management, lack of communication, and very unprofessional customer service.

After this experience, I would not recommend this hotel to anyone looking for respectful hospitality in Abu Dhabi.

reviews.positives: The location because I had some business to attend, and it was near from the location
reviews.negatives:
My stay at Novotel Abu Dhabi was disappointing. Upon checking in, I found the air conditioner ineffective, a light and curtains that wouldn’t close, which made it impossible to sleep. Despite notifying the hotel via Booking.com, no action was taken.

The next morning, I reported these issues at the reception, and while they promised repairs, only the light was fixed by the time I returned. The air conditioner remained inadequate, I expected better service, especially in a city like Abu Dhabi, where I assumed hotels would prioritize guest comfort. Ultimately, I ended up extending my stay by two days due to the lack of sleep. I wouldn’t recommend this hotel based on my experience.

Transparency in booking requirements and better customer handling at reception would greatly improve the guest experience.

reviews.title: A very bad experience. I do not recommend this hotel at all, especially for important occasions like weddings.
reviews.positives: Unfortunately, there was nothing positive worth mentioning
reviews.negatives:
What didn’t you like about the property?
We booked a wedding hall and a first-class wedding service, yet the experience was extremely disappointing. The bride was not given enough time to check out, and the service was very poor. We were embarrassed in front of our guests due to the bad organization and unprofessional behavior.
The bride was not given any extra time in the room despite the fact that she was a bride. Instead, she was disturbed with repeated phone calls asking her to leave the room.
We paid for two nights for three rooms with a total of 9,000 AED, yet we did not receive even the minimum level of respectful treatment or proper service. 

I would like to sincerely thank Ms. Shaimaa for her warm welcome and kind treatment. She truly tried her best to help us by arranging extra hours for the rooms. Thank you, Shaimaa, and I wish you all the best and every success.

reviews.title: Pathetic !!
reviews.negatives:
I paid for dinner during the check-in process. However, when we arrived at the restaurant, we were surprised to find that our room number was not on the list. The lady at the counter told us to proceed while she checked with the lobby. Two minutes later, the counter staff returned and informed us that we had not paid for dinner, which was quite embarrassing. I asked her to verify with the lobby and even showed her a copy of the payment transaction. Despite this, she insisted that we leave our dinner and go to the lobby to resolve the issue. Once we arrived at the lobby, everything was cleared up.

Additionally, the elevator was not reading the NFC cards, which are necessary for accessing the rooms. This forced us to visit different floors and change elevators multiple times just to reach our own floor, which took up a lot of time.

The rooms were not clean, and the bathrooms were particularly unsatisfactory. The toilets were not clean at all!

Furthermore, the pool area was poorly managed. I saw children in the pool with feces on the backs of their swimsuits! There was only one guard for three pools, which is clearly insufficient. Overall, the housekeeping was very lacking, leading to a disappointing experience.

reviews.positives:
Hi from the bottom of my heart I don’t really want to write the review but for so many facts I’m writing to letting you know please don’t it too personal to the staff. 
So first of all when I arrive the hotel I approached the reception and ask one of the FO to check my reservation but the girl she said she’s a bit busy because she cutting the key for one of the waiting guest. So I sit back and waited and assume for her to call me unfortunately she went for a break and been missing. So as I can’t wait any longer after my 12 hrs flights I decided to approach one of the girl from FO then after waiting for 45 mins my room was ready. 
My point of view here is there is no proper handover from colleague to one another and arriving at mid night and the room wasn’t ready is not acceptable plus you have to wait another 45 mins for the que and have to follow up yourself then you go to the room.
As far as I know when someone have to wait for the room they have to get the compensation for e.g, room upgrade, free Breakfast, lunch or dinner for the inconvenience but nothing were offered only apology for the waiting. 
I’m sorry to say this but the property to work on also doing the registration for check in to keep up to at least within 5 mins of the interaction and at least inform anything about the facilities like restaurants or gym but nothing were informed. reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
We wanted to go kayaking in eastern mangroves so we decided to book in Novotel. It has good reviews online and the package is not that expensive (but not so cheap). 

The reservation guy is very nice, he allowed us to check in before 2 pm.  

The room size is not that bad but the bed sheet is crumpled. (I took some photos) I didn't want to make it a big issue that will ruin my holiday so we decided to ignore and enjoy.  I asked for room slippers because it wasn't available at that time but they ignore my first request and responded on the 2nd one (after 2 hrs). 

The washroom! The most important part. It doesn't have good exhaust hahaha.  It will take a lot of hours (believe me) to get rid of that thing. So be careful not to do it in there hahaha. I know its gross but I'm being honest on my review.

The breakfast is good! I asked for no onion omelet but still. Maybe they know whats best for me? After all, we managed to have a great holiday.
reviews.response:

At Novotel, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every guest; therefore your feedback is very important to us.

We look forward to welcoming you again.
Sincerely, 
Bruno Debray 
General Manager

reviews.positives: The breakfast spread. It catered to a variety of diet preferences. The serving staff were cordial and esp the patisserie chef was very kind to take me through the options. Glad that most of the menu was skewed to healthy diet.
reviews.negatives:
Everything except the breakfast. Right from the check in process, we were having trouble. The check in staff was neither warm or cordial, she did not even brief us on the hotel facilities. It seemed as though she is uninterested. 

The room offered initially was so filthy with food remains dried up to stains everywhere. The bathroom floor had some dried spillage which was clearly not mopped. We immediately demanded another clean room which was though a better version, but still having cleanliness issues. I was too pissed to be keep demanding cleaner rooms. Accor group of hotels seem to have this as a constant: filthy rooms. We were 3 occupants in the room and the drinking water bottle was just 1. Another drawback was for every houskeeping request was centralised and hence the lady in charge kept procrastinating our request for a water refill. One night we had run out of the personally purchased water since it would take ages get a request processed. So i had to take my meds and there was no water. After at least 4-5 calls, i got the water refilled after almost 2 hrs.
They do not provide ironbox in the room and has to be requested for. The reason given was " its not practical and economical for every room to have one".  Of all the hotels i have stayed this reason was one of a kind. 
Overall experience was pathetic. I would dread to return here. I am shocked that such a hotel is running in a place like uae.

reviews.title: terrible experience
reviews.text: I wish I could give a 0 star rating for this place. Was my first visit and for sure the last !! Stayed for a week and it was terrible.. It's a shame for such a nice building and interior.. VERY VERY POOR CUSTOMER SERVICE. I hope this review can save someone from going through the same horrible experience again. I will not talk about the housekeeping and the slow valet parking. TODAY MORNING MARKED MY BIGGEST . DISAPPOINTMENT..Had a meeting to catch at 8 and called the bell boy service to take my luggage and put it in my car before 7 am !!15 minutes passed and nobody showed up although I called twice and everytime the answer was he is on the way !!! Had to carry my luggage myself. Found the bell boy at the lift he took my luggage and my laptops ..and while pushing the trolly he slammed my laptop against the wall and got it almost broke ! He then offered to get my car from the basement and asked me to wait in the lobby. Although I offered him to go together to the basement to save time and take my car from there ..to cut this story short.. half an hour passed and the guy didnt show up.. the front desk ladies had no clue ..it wasnt busy at that time..yet they couldnt attend my complaint..Another guy showed up with my parking ticket and keys and askwd if they belong to me !!! after half an hour of waiting ..apart from the 15 min waiting for the trolly.. I left the hotel at 7:45 !!!! the simple request of taking my luggage to my car took a whole 45 min !!!!! I was late for my meeting and had a terrible time to make it up !! WORST START OF A DAY..WORST CUSTOMER SERVICE..all they did was looking clueless and whispering to each others !!! without giving me an explanation..all what I was getting is sorry maam !!! seriously !!!!???? Please save your self this terrible experience and never book there again.

reviews.title: Good value for money with some flaws
reviews.text:
The hotel is good in general and the best thing is good value for money..
It's located in the center between Yas island and the coast which make it good for those who wants activities in both sides if Abu dhabi..
The rooms are clean ..The staff were very helpful in the beginning, I asked for interconnected room for my family and they provide it ..I asked to add breakfast to my reservation and they add it with a reasonable charge..

reviews.title: Inconvenience and pretty bad experience
reviews.positives: Breakfast was the only good thing about this hotel
reviews.negatives:
Upon arrival, I was initially allocated a room that did not correspond with my confirmed booking. I had to request a room change to receive the category I had reserved. Unfortunately, the replacement room had a malfunctioning thermostat. I reported the issue within minutes of occupying the room.
A technician was sent and advised that the issue had been resolved and would stabilize within 30 minutes. When the problem persisted, I contacted reception again. A second technician attended, made adjustments, and provided the same assurance. After waiting over an hour with no improvement, I contacted reception once more. A third technician was sent, who again stated the issue was resolved and that the temperature would normalize within another hour.
Despite repeated interventions, the thermostat remained non-functional. At no point did any staff member acknowledge that the thermostat itself was faulty or offer a room change as a solution. There was also a noticeable lack of apology or empathy throughout the process.
By 4:00 AM, the room had become extremely cold, making it impossible to sleep. Only after contacting reception at that time was I finally offered a room change. This issue could have been resolved much earlier had it been addressed proactively.
Additionally, during checkout, no staff member inquired about my stay, leaving me without an opportunity to share this feedback in person. Overall, my experience was disappointing, and my impression of the hotel is negative. The rooms were also significantly smaller compared to comparable hotels in Dubai.
I would advise future guests to consider alternative accommodations to avoid similar inconvenience.

reviews.title: Loud music on the third floor of Novotel Al Bustan Abu Dhabi kept me awake all night. Despite my complaint, the manager’
reviews.negatives:
I had a deeply disappointing experience at Novotel Al Bustan Abu Dhabi last night. My stay on the third floor was completely disrupted by extremely loud music that played non-stop throughout the entire night. It was impossible to sleep, and this level of disturbance is unacceptable for a hotel of this standard.

I reported the issue to the staff, and while the manager did visit my room and promised to resolve the problem, nothing was done to reduce the noise. The only solution offered was to move rooms in the middle of the night, which I declined as I was too exhausted to pack and relocate at that hour. The music continued relentlessly, making it clear that no effective action was taken.

This issue needs urgent attention, as it’s not just about my experience—other guests and families staying on the third floor will likely face the same problem. I strongly recommend the hotel address this noise issue to ensure a comfortable stay for all guests. Very disappointed and unlikely to return unless this is resolved.

He asked if I was offered another room? that offer was naver made, WHY NOT. Why wasn't this option offered. The tail waging the dog.

BERMUDA 
VACTION RUINED
